comments: Keyed by Polish word. Descriptions are written to work with the prompt template: 'bold graphic illustration, screen-print aesthetic, {description}, strong readable shapes, white background, no text, no letters, no numbers'. Emotion and weather entries embed their own colour direction. For number entries the generation script should omit 'no text, no letters, no numbers' since the numeral is the content.
Cześć: a person with an outstretched arm waving hello with a wide open-handed gesture, big confident smile, warm earthy tones

przystawka: a small side plate with a delicate starter portion arranged on it, a single garnish finishing the presentation, warm earthy tones
gorączka: a thermometer with the red mercury line risen very high, a person in bed behind it with a flushed face and closed eyes, warm red and earthy tones

prosto: a straight road narrowing into the distance with a bold straight-ahead arrow painted on the tarmac, strong perspective, earthy warm tones

tam: a distant location pin just visible across a landscape with a dotted line path leading toward it from the foreground, earthy warm tones

daleko: two simple objects separated by a vast empty expanse, a long double-headed arrow spanning the gap, one object tiny in the far distance, earthy warm tones

na dół: a staircase descending away with a bold downward arrow following the line of the steps, strong perspective showing depth, earthy warm tones
